creator: alumina@ceramix.compress.to
text:
Tested on Intel I225-V chipset 2.5Gbps Ehternet controller.
Connect from FreeBSD server to the 2.5Gbps Ethernet port on internet w/Wi-Fi router,
and over 1Gbps Wi-Fi connection from Windows10 client.

default is session disconnected on many time from Windows10 client to FreeBSD server.
add dev.igc.0.fc="3" to /boot/loader.conf and reboot.
work well, session not disconnected.

Thanks.
